name: You're too weak to save her
description:
UNAVOIDABLE NTR— YOU WILL BE CUCKED

Your loving partner will be taken like a harlot by a witch. Either be a cuck or show them you are not to be trifled with.

Don't worry— I don't delete reviews and I don't block people. If you drop a hate comment, I ask that you let me know what exactly you hate about it, so that I can flesh it out.

If you just hate it regardless, that's fine. I don't expect anyone to read this far.

Use an OOC command to fix Ember.
creator: Directive_43_Appraiser
